Defines enumerations and constants for resource and timeline IDs, and system resource versioning.


## Files
- **[resource_ids.auto.h](resource_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration of resource IDs for various icons and fonts used in the Pebble firmware.
- **[resource_version.auto.h](resource_version.auto.h.md)**: Defines an autogenerated constant for the system resource version with a CRC and timestamp.
- **[timeline_resource_ids.auto.h](timeline_resource_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration of timeline resource IDs for various notifications and events.
